metadata.note: Uses the POST multipart history XHR JSON endpoint and splits requests into max 5-year date windows. Requires EXCHANGERATES_AJAX_NONCE and usually EXCHANGERATES_COOKIE from a browser session.

CBR official USD/RUB rate, RUB per 1 USD

metadata.note: Initial run backfills official CBR daily history from XML_dynamic.asp. The 15-minute schedule checks whether CBR has published a new official daily rate; it is not an intraday market quote.

sources._comment: Nowcast group: Russia monetary policy, liquidity, credit, and OFZ curve

series.series_name: Bank of Russia key rate, percent per annum

metadata.note: Backfills and updates the Bank of Russia key rate from the official KeyRate page. Values are stored as annual percent points.

series.series_name: Bank of Russia key rate meeting dummy

metadata.note: Backfills and updates a 0/1 event dummy for Bank of Russia key rate meetings from the official calendar of key rate decisions. Observations use the expected press-release publication time from the CBR page, converted from Moscow time to UTC; downstream feature tables should fill non-meeting dates with 0.

sources.source_name: CBR key rate decision publication dummy

series.series_name: Bank of Russia key rate decision publication dummy

metadata.note: Backfills and updates a 0/1 event dummy for publication of Bank of Russia key rate decisions. Observed_at and publication_at use the expected press-release publication time from the official CBR calendar, converted from Moscow time to UTC; downstream feature tables should fill non-publication timestamps with 0.

sources.source_name: CBR RUONIA dynamics and calculation parameters

series.series_name: RUONIA rate, percent per annum
RUONIA transactions volume, billion RUB
RUONIA transactions count
RUONIA participants count
RUONIA minimum rate, percent per annum
RUONIA 25th percentile rate, percent per annum
RUONIA 75th percentile rate, percent per annum
RUONIA maximum rate, percent per annum

metadata.note: Backfills and updates RUONIA dynamics from the official Bank of Russia RUONIA dynamics page. Volume is stored in billion rubles; rates are annual percent points.

sources.source_name: CBR Russia money supply and credit to economy

series.series_name: Russia money supply M2, billion RUB
Russia household loans, billion RUB
Russia corporate loans, billion RUB

metadata.note: Single live job for RU_M2, RU_CREDIT_HOUSEHOLDS and RU_CREDIT_CORPORATES. It backfills the official Bank of Russia credit_m2x.xlsx file from 2015-01-01, then each run compares against the latest stored observation by series and inserts only newly published periods. Values are from the 'млрд рублей' sheet and are stored in billion rubles. publication_at is read from official CBR version tooltips when present; older historical rows use a same-month publication-date estimate configured by publication_at_fallback_day and are marked in raw_payload.publication_at_source.

series.series_name: CBR structural liquidity deficit/surplus

Credit institutions correspondent accounts with CBR
Average required reserves

metadata.note: CBR SecInfo SOAP endpoint. WSDL documentation: Information on securities market, version 25.04.2024.

metadata.note: Uses CBR SecInfo zcyc_paramsXML. Values are annual percentage yields at the requested maturity points.

sources._comment: Nowcast group: Russia prices, activity, and external trade

series.series_name: Russia CPI inflation, month-over-month, percent

metadata.note: Historical backfill from storage/exports/russia.cpi.monthly.long.csv (generated by build_ru_cpi_long.py). Source: statbureau.org (Rosstat data), from 2015-01-01 through latest available. Release dates: FRED realtime_start for 2015-Mar 2022, estimated (4th business day of following month) for 2022+. This source is for one-off backfill; use STATBUREAU_RU_CPI_MOM for ongoing updates.

sources.source_name: statbureau.org Russia CPI MoM – live feed

series.series_name: Russia CPI inflation, month-over-month, percent

metadata.note: Fetches MoM CPI for Russia from statbureau.org free JSON API (get-data-json?country=russia). Source: statbureau.org aggregates official Rosstat CPI releases. Rosstat publishes data in two phases: preliminary (1 decimal) on the ~4th business day of the following month, final (2 decimals) around the middle of the month. Runs daily; deduplication handled by the DB unique constraint. No API key required. Attribution: link to statbureau.org is required per their terms.

sources.source_name: CBR Russia CPI YoY – live feed

series.series_name: Russia CPI inflation, year-over-year, percent

metadata.note: Live YoY CPI feed from CBR statistics page (https://www.cbr.ru/statistics/ddkp/infl/). CBR republishes official Rosstat data. Date format on page is MM.YYYY mapped to the first of each month. publication_at set to the 4th business day of the following month (Rosstat preliminary release schedule). Runs daily at 09:00; incremental via latest_observed_at.

sources.source_name: Russia industrial production index YoY - historical CSV (Rosstat)

series.series_name: Russia industrial production index, percent of corresponding month previous year

metadata.note: Historical monthly backfill from storage/exports/russia.industrial_production.monthly.yoy.csv, generated by storage/exports/build_ru_industrial_production.py from Rosstat enterprise_industrial XLSX files. Indicator: industrial production index for the Russian Federation, OKVED2 BCDE, percent of the corresponding month of the previous year. Range starts at 2015-01-01. published_at is filled from Rosstat news-release dates where available on the current Rosstat site; older periods without a discoverable current-site release date are left blank. vintage_at is the update date of the source XLSX vintage.

sources.source_name: Rosstat Russia industrial production index YoY - live feed

series.series_name: Russia industrial production index, percent of corresponding month previous year

metadata.note: Live updater for RU_INDUSTRIAL_PRODUCTION. Each run reads Rosstat enterprise_industrial, parses current ind_baza_* XLSX files for OKVED2 BCDE, compares against the latest stored RU_INDUSTRIAL_PRODUCTION observation globally, and inserts only newly published months. publication_at is resolved from recent Rosstat news releases where available; vintage_at is the update date of the source XLSX file.

series.series_name: Russia retail trade turnover, million RUB, current prices

metadata.note: Historical monthly backfill from storage/exports/russia.retail_sales.monthly.csv, generated by storage/exports/build_ru_retail_sales.py from Rosstat retail trade files on https://rosstat.gov.ru/statistics/roznichnayatorgovlya. Indicator: total retail trade turnover for the Russian Federation, million RUB, current prices. Range starts at 2015-01-01. publication_at and vintage_at are the Rosstat document publication/update date shown on the source page.

sources.source_name: Rosstat Russia retail sales - live feed

series.series_name: Russia retail trade turnover, million RUB, current prices

metadata.note: Live updater for RU_RETAIL_SALES. Each run reads Rosstat retail trade XLS/XLSX files, compares against the latest stored RU_RETAIL_SALES observation globally, and inserts only newly published months. publication_at and vintage_at are set to the Rosstat document publication/update date from the source page.

series.series_name: Russia goods trade balance, million USD, balance of payments methodology

metadata.note: Historical monthly backfill from storage/exports/russia.trade_balance.monthly.csv, generated by storage/exports/build_ru_trade_balance.py from the official Bank of Russia trade.xls file on https://www.cbr.ru/statistics/macro_itm/external_sector/etg/. Indicator: goods exports FOB minus goods imports FOB, million USD, balance of payments methodology. Range starts at 2015-01-01. publication_at and vintage_at are the Bank of Russia file update date shown in the source workbook, with HTTP Last-Modified as fallback.

sources.source_name: CBR Russia trade balance - live feed

series.series_name: Russia goods trade balance, million USD, balance of payments methodology

metadata.note: Live updater for RU_TRADE_BALANCE. Each run reads the official Bank of Russia trade.xls workbook, compares against the latest stored RU_TRADE_BALANCE observation globally, and inserts only newly published months. Value is goods exports FOB minus goods imports FOB, million USD. publication_at and vintage_at are set to the Bank of Russia workbook update date.

sources._comment: Nowcast group: Russia fiscal flows and tax calendar

sources.source_name: Minfin Russia oil/gas fiscal revenue and FX operations - live feed

series.series_name: Russia federal budget oil and gas revenues, billion RUB
Russia Minfin FX and gold purchase/sale operation amount, billion RUB

metadata.note: Bootstrap + live updater for Minfin oil/gas fiscal data. Each run first reads historical monthly observations from storage/exports/russia_fiscal_oilgas_monthly_from_2017_02.csv, then reads the official Minfin document table, skips annual-total columns, and appends live monthly observations that are missing from the historical CSV. Historical rows use publication_at from the CSV; live rows use the Minfin document update date as publication_at and vintage_at.
